title: spendable_notes account parameter silently ignored — forward-compat footgun
description: spendable_notes(account: u32) accepts the parameter but discards it with let _ = account. The query returns all unspent notes regardless of account. When multi-account is added, callers passing account>0 will silently get all notes instead of just account N's notes, causing spend-from-wrong-account bugs. The forward-compat intent is documented in a comment, but the current behavior is indistinguishable from a caller passing the wrong account. Fix: return Err if account \!= 0 until the column exists, so callers get an explicit error rather than silent over-selection.
close_reason: spendable_notes() returns Err if account != 0 with clear message
